title: Undopia Book on Enchanting Table
description: Gives the Book to the Enchanting Table item
body:
![book-on-enchanting-table](https://i.imgur.com/X0vpAOn.png) # Undopia Book on Enchanting Table [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/undopia-book-on-enchanting-table?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%231bd96a) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-book-on-enchanting-table) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1420716?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23f16436) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/undopia-book-on-enchanting-table) [![ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/wv1uE4k.png)](https://ko-fi.com/undugt) Undopia Book on Enchanting Table adds a Book on the Enchanting Table item. ---
[![Undopia Patch Resource Pack](https://i.imgur.com/beZ50qS.png)](https://patch.undopia.net) This resource pack is part of the Undopia Patch family. It is made of these Undopia Patch Features ![n51xMcr.png](https://i.imgur.com/n51xMcr.png) If you want to customize any of these use the Undopia Patch Customizer.
